overview: A professional political organization portal for ২নং কপিলমুনি ইউনিয়ন ছাত্রদল (Bangladesh Jatiotabadi Chhatra Dal). Features a patriotic landing page in Bengali and English, member registration with visual robot verification and photo upload, a member dashboard with PDF membership card, hierarchical committee directory, messenger-style group chat, and a full admin panel for managing members, notices, gallery, and approvals.
features: Patriotic landing page with Bengali hero and BJCD branding
Advanced member registration with photo upload and visual robot verification
Member dashboard with profile card and PDF membership card download
Digital notice board, photo gallery, alumni, achievements, and information library
Admin panel with member approval, CRUD controls, and stats dashboard
